findings.title: Review strategy/dispatch references ADR-001..004 but only ADR-001..003 exist
findings.evidence: decision-record.md contains no ADR-004 (grep clean; 317 lines ending at ADR-003); plan.md:252 and implementation-summary.md:68 both enumerate 'ADR-001..003'; checklist.md:133 CHK-100 says 'ADR-001..003'. Shipped code + all six packet docs agree on exactly three ADRs. The '..004' label appears only in the dispatch brief and review strategy doc.
findings.recommendation: Correct the review strategy/dispatch to 'ADR-001..003'; no change to reviewed code or decision-record.
findings.scopeProof: Confined to review-framing artifacts; reviewed code and decision-record both stop at ADR-003.

findings.title: Live dry-run yield (218 caused / 200 contradicts / 3 supports) undocumented in packet; contradicts 'pending' claim
findings.evidence: Dispatch reports an executed live dry-run (scanned 600, inferred 421 = 218 caused / 200 contradicts / 3 supports, written 0). These numbers appear only in deep-review-strategy.md:17; grep across the spec folder finds them in no authored packet doc. implementation-summary.md:82 states the production run is 'Post-deploy (pending)' and §90-92 limitations record no executed run. The 200 contradicts magnitude is large and unpredicted by spec.md/plan.md. Internal math consistent (218+200+3=421=inferred, relation-backfill.ts:468-469); dry-run writes 0 (relation-backfill.ts:493-500), so no correctness/data issue.
findings.recommendation: Record the executed dry-run and its 218/200/3 distribution in implementation-summary.md continuity, and add an expected-magnitude note for the 200 contradicts before the user-gated commit run.
findings.scopeProof: Dry-run path provably writes 0 (relation-backfill.ts:477-500); gap is purely absent disclosure of the executed run + unstated yield expectation.

noveltyJustification: First traceability iteration for this run (0 prior iteration records); both findings are net-new P2 advisories. weightedNew=(1+1)=2, weightedTotal=2, ratio=1.0.
verdictNote: PASS with advisories: no active P0/P1; shipped behavior matches spec + the three real ADRs; checklist evidence substantiated. Two P2 documentation/disclosure gaps.
traceabilityChecks: ADR-003 opt-in default-off + clamp + single invalidate: MATCH
ruledOut: code calls live vector_search (no: only negative comments)
